title: The Promise to Grow Stronger: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: All I want now is to die!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: My Apolo- Gies... as you wish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What...? But everything is already inside...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: In order to reach this island ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: According to the Marines stationed here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Alright, I will go with them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've decided ... I'm gonna live here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aaaarg Hhhhhh!! Don't look this way !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Too scary!! That face is too scary!!!
